text: هون ما في مجال تكون ضعيف.
en: Here, there’s no room to be weak.
The lion is strong, and the hyena is weak.
The lion is strong, and the hyena is weak.

text: الخشب ضعيف، ما بيقدر يشيل وزن كبير.
en: The wood is weak, it can’t hold a lot of weight.
The iron is strong, it doesn’t break easily.

text: الضعيف بيموت بسرعة، والقوي بيضل واقف.
en: The weak one dies quickly, and the strong one remains standing.

text: الضعيفة بتموت بسرعة، والقوية بتضل واقفة.
en: The weak one dies quickly, and the strong one remains standing.

text: الضوء ضعيف، ما في إضاءة كفاية.
en: The light is weak, there’s not enough illumination.
The argument is weak, it doesn’t convince me.
The weak one can’t face problems.

text: حجّته كانت ضعيفة، وما قدرت تصمد.
en: His argument was weak and couldn’t hold up.
